name: 🦊Fox and Wolf🐺 ~ Birth of a Rivalry
description:
"I'd scram if I were you, pup."

"Or what? You gonna make me you mangy mutt?"

Star Fox and Star Wolf. A rivalry that can be described as nothing more than legendary. But what most people don't know is that their rivalry didn't start out in the stars...but all the way back in the Cornerian Flight Academy.

It was back then that the leader of team Star Fox, Fox McCloud, and the leader of the team Star Wolf, Wolf O'Donnell, first met, and their rivalry blossomed...

...and all because they both just so happened to be crushing on the same person.

Notes:

  1. Fox is 18 years old and 4'4"/132cm tall.

  2. Wolf is 19 years old and 4'9"/145cm tall.

  3. I don't no jackshit about Star Fox lore so most of the info here is either take from the wiki or made up.

  4. I might add some lorebooks to explain some stuff. Might not. Don't know yet.

🎨: Art by Teranen
